title: Khmelnytskyi: Casualties reported
description: Ukrainian Su-24 bomber crashes in Khmelnytskyi Oblast, killing pilots, Air Force confirms. The cause and circumstances of the crash are currently under investigation, Ukraine's Air Force said. Rescue crews and law enforcement are currently working at the site, and no civilian casualties have been reported.
description_en: Ukrainian Su-24 bomber crashes in Khmelnytskyi Oblast, killing pilots, Air Force confirms. The cause and circumstances of the crash are currently under investigation, Ukraine's Air Force said. Rescue crews and law enforcement are currently working at the site, and no civilian casualties have been reported.

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Update: Drone strike knocks Moscow oil refinery completely out of action, Reuters reports. The June 16 Ukrainian drone strike on the Moscow Oil Refinery has forced a total halt in its operations, Reuters reported, citing Russian industry sources. The attack sparked a fire and severely damaged a primary refining unit responsible for over half of the plant’s capacity, contradicting claims by local...

Combat unit - approx. 4-5 kg," said Flash. According to him, the enemy...

title: Kyiv: Airstrike attack
description: Attack on Kyiv Pechersk Lavra exposes the truth behind Russia’s Christianity “The damaged roof of the Lavra tells the story of modern Russia better than a thousand speeches about faith, civilization, or “spiritual values” ever could,” writes Kate Turska, Chair of the Ukrainian Association of New Zealand, in this op-ed. Photo: Yan Dobronosov/Global Images Ukraine via Getty Images.

title: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than...

description: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than 160 entities linked to the Russian shadow fleet. We talked today about increased sanctions pressure on Russia during our meeting with Mark Carney. And it is important that there are such solutions. They also discussed the formats of defense cooperation, Canada's participation in financing the production of Ukrainian drones based on the Danish model, cooperation in the energy sector....
description_en: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than 160 entities linked to the Russian shadow fleet. We talked today about increased sanctions pressure on Russia during our meeting with Mark Carney. And it is important that there are such solutions. They also discussed the formats of defense cooperation, Canada's participation in financing the production of Ukrainian drones based on the Danish model, cooperation in the energy sector....
description_uk: Вдячний Канаді за новий пакет санкцій проти понад 160 субʼєктів, які повʼязані з російським тіньовим флотом. Говорили сьогодні про посилення санкційного тиску на Росію під час нашої зустрічі з Марком Карні. І важливо, що є такі рішення. Обговорили також формати оборонної співпраці, участь Канади у фінансуванні виробництва українських дронів за данською моделлю, співпрацю в енергетичній сфері....

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: 'Just response to Russian strikes' – Ukraine hit major oil refinery in Moscow, Zelensky confirms. Ukraine hit the Moscow Oil Refinery in the Kapotnya district of Russia's capital on June 16. The refinery is responsible for about 40% of the Moscow region's demand for petroleum products.
description_en: 'Just response to Russian strikes' – Ukraine hit major oil refinery in Moscow, Zelensky confirms. Ukraine hit the Moscow Oil Refinery in the Kapotnya district of Russia's capital on June 16. The refinery is responsible for about 40% of the Moscow region's demand for petroleum products.

Informed Mr. President about constant Russian attacks and our needs to strengthen air defense. He spoke about the situation at the front and Ukrainian long-range sanctions. Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...

Поінформував пана Президента про постійні російські атаки й наші потреби для посилення ППО. Розповів про ситуацію на фронті та українські далекобійні санкції. Peaceful people died, children were injured, and brave rescuers gave their lives as a result of a cynical repeated strike at the site of the attack. Large-scale...

title: Casualties reported
description: 👨‍🚒 Moscow kills those who save lives 🕯️We bow our heads in sorrow for the emergency services rescuers who died in Kharkiv while saving lives. They arrived at the site of the enemy attack to help the victims, but Moscow cynically struck again just as the emergency services were working. 🫡 Eternal memory and honor to the Heroes who, until their last breath, remained faithful to their duty and saved others...
description_en: 👨‍🚒 Moscow kills those who save lives 🕯️We bow our heads in sorrow for the emergency services rescuers who died in Kharkiv while saving lives. They arrived at the site of the enemy attack to help the victims, but Moscow cynically struck again just as the emergency services were working. 🫡 Eternal memory and honor to the Heroes who, until their last breath, remained faithful to their duty and saved others...
description_uk: 👨‍🚒 московія вбиває тих, хто рятує життя 🕯️Схиляємо голови у скорботі за рятувальниками ДСНС, які загинули в Харкові, рятуючи життя. Вони прибули на місце ворожого удару, щоб допомогти постраждалим, але московія цинічно завдала повторного удару саме тоді, коли працювали екстрені служби. 🫡 Вічна пам’ять і шана Героям, які до останнього подиху залишалися вірними своєму обов’язку та рятували інших...
